title: 10 best herbal capsules for hematuria
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for hematuria are natural supplements that contain extracts from various plants, such as Cornus officinalis and Arisaema cumingii, which help alleviate symptoms of blood in urine. These herbal capsules work by strengthening the urinary tract and kidneys, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, and promoting urination frequency. Examples of effective herbal capsules for hematuria include Cystone and Urtica capsules, which have been shown to improve symptoms and quality of life in individuals with recurring hematuria. By reducing the frequency and severity of bloody urine episodes, these capsules can help alleviate discomfort, anxiety, and embarrassment associated with this condition, ultimately improving overall well-being.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bearberry capsules helps with hematuria because they contain a natural compound called arbutin, which is converted into hydroquinone in the body. Hydroquinone has potent antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation and eliminate bacteria from the urinary tract, thereby alleviating symptoms of hematuria such as blood in the urine. Additionally, bearberry's antibacterial activity also helps to prevent UTIs, which is often associated with recurring hematuria.
remedy_properties: Ursolic acid: Ursolic acid, a triterpenoid compound found in bearberry, has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which helps to reduce inflammation and damage to the urinary tract, thus alleviating symptoms of hematuria.

Aromatin: Aromatin, a flavonoid present in bearberry, exhibits antibacterial and antiviral activities, helping to combat urinary tract infections (UTIs) that may cause hematuria by reducing bacterial load and preventing infection recurrence.

Tannins: Tannins, a type of polyphenol in bearberry, have astringent properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and congestion in the urinary tract, thereby relieving symptoms such as bleeding and pain associated with hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the bearberry plant contain a high concentration of alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with hematuria.
Barks: The barks of the bearberry plant are rich in flavonoids, which have antiseptic and antimicrobial properties that help to prevent infections and promote healing of urinary tract tissues.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried arctostaphylos uva ursi leaves and stems in sufficient quantity for the desired yield.
Grind the dried arctostaphylos uva ursi material into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 250-500mg of the powdered arctostaphylos uva ursi with 100-200mg of fillers such as silica or calcium carbonate in a small bowl.
Fill empty capsules with the mixed herbal powder, making sure to fill each capsule to its maximum capacity.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years or until opened.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with hematuria because they contain mucilage, a gel-like substance that soothes and protects the urinary tract lining. This natural remedy helps to reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with blood in urine, making it an effective treatment for hematuria caused by conditions such as bladder or kidney stones, UTIs, or inflammatory disorders. By providing a protective barrier, marshmallow capsules help to reduce irritation and promote healing, ultimately alleviating the symptoms of hematuria.
remedy_properties: Mucilages: Herbal marshmallow capsules contain mucilages, which are thick, protective substances that help to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the urinary tract, reducing irritation and inflammation associated with hematuria.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Marshmallow root has anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce swelling and pain in the urinary tract, making it an effective natural remedy for treating the discomfort and pain associated with hematuria.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in marshmallow capsules help to protect the urinary tract from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate conditions like hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the marshmallow plant are rich in mucilages, which help to soothe and protect the urinary tract lining, making them effective in treating hematuria.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the marshmallow plant contain a high concentration of flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce bleeding and inflammation associated with hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest althaea officinalis flowers at peak bloom and dry them thoroughly for future use.
Weigh out 500 grams of dried althaea officinalis flowers and grind into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered althaea officinalis with 250 grams of cornstarch and store in an airtight container for up to six months.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the althaea officinalis mixture and seal tightly.
Store the filled capsules in a cool dark place for at least two weeks before consumption to allow for proper infusion and maturation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal capsules helps with hematuria because they contain berberine, a natural compound that has potent anti-inflammatory properties. Berberine has been shown to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract and kidneys, which can help alleviate symptoms of hematuria, such as blood in the urine. Additionally, goldenseal's antimicrobial properties may also help combat bacterial infections that can contribute to hematuria, further reducing its occurrence and severity. By targeting both inflammation and infection, goldenseal capsules offer a natural approach to addressing this common issue.
remedy_properties: Berberine: Goldenseal contains berberine, a bioactive compound that has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which helps to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract and combat bacterial infections that may contribute to hematuria.

Coptis: Goldenseal also contains coptis, another bioactive compound that has antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which helps to prevent the growth of harmful bacteria in the urinary tract and alleviate symptoms of hematuria such as pain and discomfort.

Berberinoids: The berberinoids present in goldenseal capsules have potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the kidneys and urinary tract, ultimately reducing the frequency and severity of hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used due to their high concentration of berberine, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with hematuria.

Rhizomes: The rhizomes contain alkaloids like berberine and hydrcorticosterone, which have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in treating urinary tract infections and reducing hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of fresh hydrastis canadensis root and clean it thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the cleaned root in a warm oven at 60°c for 4 hours to remove excess moisture.
Grind 10g of dried hydrastis canadensis root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered root with 50mg of gelatin and 100ml of distilled water to create a uniform capsule filler.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Burdock capsules helps with hematuria because they contain saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce bleeding and discomfort associated with urinary tract issues. The plant's flavonoids also strengthen blood vessel walls, making them less prone to rupture and subsequent bleeding. Additionally, burdock root has been traditionally used to support liver function and promote the elimination of toxins from the body, which can contribute to hematuria relief. By addressing these underlying causes, herbal burdock capsules offer a natural solution for managing hematuria symptoms.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Burdock capsules have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the urinary tract, alleviating symptoms of hematuria such as burning and discomfort.

Antibacterial and Antiviral Properties: Burdock's antibacterial and antiviral properties can help combat underlying infections that may be contributing to hematuria, reducing the severity and frequency of bleeding episodes.

Astringent and Anti-Edematous Effects: Burdock's astringent properties help reduce inflammation and bleeding in the urinary tract by constricting blood vessels and drying up excess mucus, while its anti-edematous effects can help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, which helps to soothe and protect the urinary tract, making it effective in reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with hematuria.
Rhyzomes: Contain a unique combination of compounds that help to reduce bleeding and ease pain caused by hematuria, while also promoting healing and tissue repair.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried roots of arctium lappa and grind into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix 250 milligrams of the powdered root with 500 milliliters of distilled water in a clean glass container.
Steep the mixture for 30 minutes at room temperature before straining through cheesecloth or coffee filter.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-milligram dosages of the filtered liquid extract and seal tightly.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container protected from light and heat at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with hematuria because they contain powerful antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract. The herb's diuretic properties also increase urine production, which can help to flush out harmful bacteria and toxins that may be causing the bleeding. Additionally, dandelion has been shown to help heal damaged tissue in the bladder and kidneys, reducing the risk of further damage and promoting overall kidney health.
remedy_properties: Diuretic properties: Dandelion helps to increase urine production, which can help to flush out the body and reduce blood in the urine by removing excess waste and toxins that may be contributing to the condition.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion contains antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that may help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the urinary tract, which can contribute to hematuria and other urinary issues.

Choleretic and cholagogue properties: Dandelion stimulates the production of bile and gallbladder contractions, which can help to improve digestion and reduce stagnation in the digestive system that may be contributing to hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Dandelion roots contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds, such as inulin and taraxasterol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate symptoms of hematuria.
Buds: Dandelion buds are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh dandelion roots of taraxacum officinale in the early morning dew when they are most potent and effective.
Dry the harvested roots in a warm dark place at 60-70 degrees fahrenheit for four to six weeks or until crispy.
Grind dried dandelion root into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part ground dandelion root with two parts vegetable capsules in a small bowl, filling each capsule approximately half full of the herbal mixture.
Seal the filled capsules and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate for longer preservation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with hematuria because they contain a unique blend of bioactive compounds that target the root causes of this condition. The capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can lead to blood in the urine. Additionally, the antioxidants present in the capsules help to protect the kidneys and bladder from damage caused by free radicals, further reducing the risk of hematuria.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Ginkgo biloba contains flavonoids and terpenes that have antioxidant properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body.
Vasodilation: The plant's active compounds may help to dilate blood vessels, improving circulation and potentially reducing blood pressure.
Anti-inflammatory effects: Ginkgo biloba has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce swelling and pain associated with certain conditions.
remedy_parts: Roots: Maidenhair tree roots have been traditionally used to treat urinary disorders, including hematuria, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
Barks: The bark of the maidenhair tree is rich in tannins and flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the urinary tract, making it effective for treating hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves from a trusted supplier.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 30 minutes.
Combine 4 grams of the powdered ginkgo biloba with 100 milliliters of distilled water in a heat-resistant glass container.
Simmer the mixture over low heat for 15 minutes, then let it steep for 1 hour before filtering out the liquid.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 400 milligrams of the filtered extract and seal them tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules help with hematuria because they contain curcumin, a powerful compound that has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. When consumed orally, curcumin is absorbed into the bloodstream and reaches the kidneys where it reduces inflammation and oxidative stress caused by hematuria. This leads to a significant reduction in symptoms such as burning sensation during urination, frequent urination, and blood clots in urine. The anti-inflammatory action of curcumin also helps to prevent further damage to the urinary tract lining and promotes healthy kidney function.
remedy_properties: Curcumin's anti-inflammatory activity: Curcumin, a polyphenol compound found in turmeric, has potent anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce inflammation in the urinary tract and kidneys, which can contribute to hematuria.
Antioxidant properties: Turmeric's antioxidants, including curcumin, may help neutralize free radicals that can damage kidney tissue and cause bleeding, thereby reducing the occurrence of hematuria.

Uricosuric activity: Turmeric has been shown to increase urate excretion in the urine, which can help reduce the concentration of uric acid in the blood and prevent its deposition in kidneys, a potential cause of hematuria.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzome, or underground stem, of turmeric is a rich source of curcuminoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help alleviate symptoms of hematuria.

Roots: Turmeric roots are used to extract the bioactive compound curcumin, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the kidneys, making it an effective treatment for hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality turmeric roots extract 1000mg of dried powder from organic curcuma longa plants.
Cleanse and grind the turmeric powder into fine particles using mortar and pestle for 30 minutes.
Mix the ground turmeric powder with 500mg of vegetable capsule filler powder in a clean glass container.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to maintain freshness for 24 hours.
Store the curcuma longa capsules in an airtight container at room temperature protected from light for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: White willow capsules helps with hematuria because they contain salicin, a natural anti-inflammatory compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain in the urinary tract. This is particularly effective for individuals experiencing hematuria, or blood in the urine, caused by conditions such as kidney stones, cystitis, or prostatitis. By reducing inflammation and pain, white willow capsules can help promote a faster recovery and alleviate symptoms associated with hematuria.
remedy_properties: Salicin content: White willow capsules contain salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which helps to reduce inflammation and ease pain associated with hematuria.
Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in white willow capsules help to neutralize free radicals that can damage kidney tissues, reducing the risk of further bleeding and promoting healing.

Anti-inflammatory properties: White willow capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce swelling and inflammation in the urinary tract, which helps to alleviate symptoms of hematuria such as burning urination and frequency.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in salicin, a natural pain reliever and anti-inflammatory compound that helps alleviate the discomfort associated with hematuria.
Barks: Contain salicin and other bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain in the urinary tract, making it effective for treating hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30 grams of dried salix alba bark from a reliable source.
Grind the dried bark into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part of the ground salix alba bark with two parts of gelatin in a clean glass container.
Add 20 milliliters of purified water to the mixture and stir well for 10 minutes to create a paste.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with 500 milligrams of the salix alba paste and store in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with hematuria because they contain bioactive compounds that help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH). The herb's natural anti-inflammatory properties soothe the urinary tract, reducing swelling and discomfort associated with hematuria. Additionally, stinging nettle's ability to improve blood vessel tone and circulation may also help to reduce bleeding and frequency of hematuria episodes. By addressing the underlying causes of hematuria, stinging nettle capsules offer a natural and effective solution for managing this common condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Stinging nettle's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and polyphenols, help reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can alleviate symptoms of hematuria.

Antioxidant properties: Nettle's antioxidants, like beta-carotene and lutein, protect against oxidative stress and damage to the kidneys and bladder tissues, reducing the risk of hematuria and promoting overall urinary health.

Uric acid reduction properties: Nettle has been shown to reduce uric acid levels in the body, which can contribute to hematuria by forming kidney stones or irritating the urinary tract; by reducing uric acid levels, nettle capsules may help alleviate symptoms of hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Containing anti-inflammatory compounds, nettle roots help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with hematuria.
Seeds: Rich in omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants, nettle seeds promote healthy urinary tract function and combat oxidative stress contributing to hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh urtica dioica leaves and stems in the early morning or evening when dew is present weighing approximately 500 grams.
Dry the harvested material using shade drying method for 3-4 days or oven at 40°c for 24 hours to prevent spoilage.
Grind dried plant material into coarse powder using mortar and pestle or food processor to enhance bioavailability.
Fill 500-milligram empty capsules with a mixture of powdered urtica dioica (300 milligrams) and silica filler (200 milligrams) prepared within 24 hours of filling.
Store the filled capsules in airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or refrigerate for up to 12 months while monitoring appearance and potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover capsules helps with hematuria because they contain isoflavones, specifically biochanin A and formononetin, which have been shown to have a positive effect on reducing bleeding frequency and intensity. These compounds help to improve blood vessel tone, reducing inflammation and improving the overall health of the urinary tract. Additionally, red clover's anti-inflammatory properties may also help to alleviate discomfort and pain associated with hematuria. By addressing these underlying causes, red clover capsules can provide relief from this common and sometimes debilitating condition.
remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover contains high levels of isoflavones, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve urinary tract health, helping to alleviate symptoms of hematuria such as burning and frequency.

Phytoestrogens: The phytoestrogen content in red clover has been found to help regulate hormonal imbalances that can contribute to hematuria, promoting a healthy uterine lining and reducing the risk of bleeding.

Antioxidants: Red clover is rich in antioxidants, which help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the urinary tract, thereby reducing the damage caused by hematuria and promoting overall urinary health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Red clover roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing swelling and discomfort associated with hematuria.
Buds: The buds of the red clover plant contain high concentrations of flavonoids, which help to stabilize blood vessels and reduce inflammation in the urinary tract.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh trifolium pratense leaves and flowers in the morning for optimal potency and quality.
Dry the harvested plant material in a well-ventilated area at room temperature for 24 hours.
Grind the dried trifolium pratense into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 15 minutes.
Mix the powdered herb with 500mg of gelatin capsules and fill them by hand or use an automatic capsule filler.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in the refrigerator at 2-8°c for up to 6 months.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hematuria with herbal capsules is by taking a comprehensive blend of herbs that address the underlying causes. A combination of Berberis, Buchu, and Uva Ursi helps to reduce inflammation and soothe the urinary tract. Meanwhile, Marshmallow root and Corn Silk provide natural anti-inflammatory properties to alleviate discomfort. Regular intake of these herbal capsules can help to eliminate symptoms and promote overall bladder health.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hematuria that are treated with herbal capsules are urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and bladder inflammation. Herbal remedies such as Saw Palmetto, Marshmallow Root, and Dandelion Root are used to alleviate symptoms of these conditions. These herbs help to soothe the urinary tract, reduce inflammation, and promote healthy kidney function, providing natural relief from discomfort and pain.
